title: Scaffold single-crate Rust project
description: Set up a single broadside crate (not a workspace). Binary with axum, tokio, sqlx, serde, reqwest, clap. All shared-looking code (HTTP signatures, delivery, actor docs, WebFinger, NodeInfo) lives in modules within this crate for now. Fieldwork extraction into a shared crate is deferred until smallhold needs it — no speculative API design.
close_reason: Cargo.toml, main.rs, cli.rs, config.rs, db.rs — compiles clean
